taxonomy: Cyclobothra pallida is classified as a species within the plant family Proteaceae. It belongs to the genus Cyclobothra, which is part of the larger order Proteales. The species is native to Western Australia and is characterized by its unique leaf structure. Its classification also places it within the kingdom Plantae and the domain Eukarya. Further research may be needed to fully understand the taxonomic classification of this species.
